We have basicly 3 kinds of pages SEO article pages (no clear cta purpose to positoin company as thought leader and build brand) SEO product pages (informative pages, but with a clear CTA and an attemp to capture a purchase itent or generate one), Pure landing page (These are for the highly motivated users. there is little to no text just images and focus on USPs).

I was thinking that SEO article and SEO product could share one template with a toggle in the CMS to remove the CTA. The pure landing page will always be custom crafted with various  premade components. How does that sound?
